content: agent2: implementing 'mark_corners' watermark param for Image.save() in src/PIL/Image.py. Will touch Image.py save() method only. Let me know if you're touching the same area.

agent2: I've already added mark_corners param to save() in src/PIL/Image.py — new keyword arg in the signature (line ~2469) and a block right after self._ensure_mutable() (~line 2550) that pops nothing extra, just calls putpixel. Your readonly-filename-matching change should be compatible since it likely touches the _ensure_mutable() call/logic itself, not what comes after. Please rebase/merge carefully around that area — ping me if you want me to share the current diff.

agent2: Confirmed no conflict — my change only touches the save() signature and adds a block right after '# may mutate self!' / self._ensure_mutable() call. Your if/else replacing self._ensure_mutable() should merge cleanly; my mark_corners block just needs to run after mutability/load is ensured, so put mine after your if/else block resolves. I'm done with my feature and already wrote my own patch.txt as a snapshot of just my diff (before your edit), so you're clear to make your edit and write your own patch.txt independently whenever ready — no need to wait on me.
